source: Telonex Polymarket markets, crypto_prices, book_snapshot_5, trades, and onchain_fills
availability_note: Telonex currently exposes BTC 5-minute markets from 2025-12-17, BTC market book/trade/fill layers from 2026-02-12, and BTC settlement crypto_prices from 2026-04-02. The modeling universe keeps only markets with complete 1-second price and Up/Down book state.

quality_reasons.reason: Null best bid/ask in at least one second
